summary: Bright, sparkly transfer with excellent high‑end clarity; performance details not mentioned.
review: The reviewer praises the transfer as amazing, highlighting a bright and sparkling high‑end that makes the recording worth downloading. No comments are provided about the musical performance or setlist, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this review alone.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single five‑star review focuses on the transfer quality; no information on the performance, so rating is based mainly on recording excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bright, sparkly high‑end sound; reviewer calls the transfer amazing and worth the download.
